envelope.subject: TCS — Initiation; PT ₹4,300
envelope.bodyText: We initiate coverage on TCS with Buy. PT ₹4,300. Full deck linked: https://cdn.jmfl.com/research/TCS-init-2026-04.pdf

linkedRefs.cachedText:
TCS — Initiation of Coverage.

Recommendation: Buy. Target Price ₹4,300. We see deal-driven revenue acceleration through FY27 with EBIT margins recovering to 25%. Risks: US discretionary, INR strength, attrition.
